underlying_goal: Start the first convoy in their Gas Town system by creating a rig for 'nelson' as an external git repo with a port connection to town
friction_detail: The convoy stager couldn't dispatch HQ beads to rigs since they route to town root, requiring manual convoy creation instead.
brief_summary: User wanted to launch their first convoy to create a nelson rig as an external git repo; Claude scoped the work, created the convoy manually after the stager failed, and began investigation but session ended mid-execution.
